text:
There once was a little hedgehog who lived beneath oak trees. Every morning, he would pop his eyes open against the sunlight streaming through. Today was Sunday, so he decided to sleep late. That’s okay; he hadn. Ow.

As he stretched his limbs, he dreamed whimsically of grand adventures. He soared through fields turning autumn colors. Then he landed beside a brook that lazily sang.

"A fine day," he whispered.

He drank deeply, feeling uplifted. That's when he heard the melody coming from the forest.

"Hello?" he called out softly.

Woodlands hushed. Creatures shuffled toward him. His heart fluttered; he hadn't thought much about life, but now...

"Please," he said gently, "could you play something nice?"

From behind a twisted elm came gentle notes. The creature was a dear owl. They danced in time. The little hedgehog laughed.

Back asleep he fell. He woke in his own cozy burrow feeling refreshed.
